title: orthilia secunda var. nummularis
intro: Orthilia secunda var. nummularis, also known as Western Mountain Cranberry or Mountain Cranberry, is a plant species in the heath family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as supporting urinary tract health and reducing inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions like urinary tract infections and arthritis. Orthilia secunda var. nummularis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
